name: Custom Nodes & Extensions Demo
description: Demonstrates TypeScript-based custom nodes in Zipp packages. Includes Text Formatter, JSON Extractor nodes, and AI/LLM extension.
author: ZIPP Team

embeddedCustomNodes.name: TS JSON Parser
embeddedCustomNodes.description: Parse JSON and extract values by path (TypeScript-based)

embeddedNodeExtensions.name: Custom AI Provider Extension
embeddedNodeExtensions.description: Adds a custom AI provider option to the AI/LLM node
